component_rule.at_active_scale: one degree-mu local polynomial tail, reconstructed from its root divisor and the mu-fold outer-node fiber
component_rule.before_active_scale: one degree-mu power connector, with both node fibers mu-fold

consequence: the harmonic source tree, component degrees, local rational maps, and saturated node-branch counts are canonical on every radial ordered-scale stratum; full-chain radial inertia is product_j L_j/M_j; the recursive resonance atlas separately constructs all residue-resonance refinements and contractions
node_rule: at a radial node, an inactive multiplicity-mu cluster contributes one index mu and an active cluster contributes mu indices 1
radial_inertia_rule: for ordered blocks B_j, order is product_j L_j/M_j, where M_j is the lcm on B_j and L_j is the lcm on the suffix from B_j
scope: radial source combinatorics and vertex maps for labelled clusters; nonradial smoothing and the full stack comparison are verified by the separate recursive resonance atlas
